channel.title: API and async :: Flutter en rigle.dev
channel.description: Solved Flutter API and async exercises: REST calls with http, loading state management with FutureBuilder, and infinite scroll with pagination.

item.title: Flutter timeout and retry: solved exercise
item.description: Implement timeout and retry with backoff for HTTP calls in Flutter.

item.title: Loading, error and empty states in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Build a robust screen with loading, empty, and error states for remote lists.

item.title: Typed JSON parsing in Flutter: solved exercise
item.description: Convert JSON into typed models to reduce bugs and improve maintainability.

item.title: Infinite Scroll in Flutter: solved pagination exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter infinite scroll exercise with batch pagination, ScrollController, and incremental load control.

item.title: FutureBuilder in Flutter: solved exercise for loading states
item.description: Learn FutureBuilder in Flutter with a solved exercise handling loading, error, and data states clearly.

item.title: Flutter API Call with http: solved REST exercise
item.description: Solved Flutter API exercise using the http package, JSON parsing, and safe rendering for remote data.
